label: Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF

node.label: Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF
node.definition: Reward-model-based RLHF fits a preference predictor and optimizes a policy against it, usually with a divergence penalty limiting drift from a reference model.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF is modeled as depending on Reward modeling, Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives and feeding downstream nodes such as Conversational assistants & chatbots.
examples: atlas downstream link to Conversational assistants & chatbots
limitations: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Reward modeling, Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives.

sentence_units.text: Reward-model-based RLHF fits a preference predictor and optimizes a policy against it, usually with a divergence penalty limiting drift from a reference model.

In this atlas graph, Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF is modeled as depending on Reward modeling, Policy-gradient & actor–critic objectives and feeding downstream nodes such as Conversational assistants & chatbots.
